title: campylotropis trigonoclada var. bonatiana
intro: Campylotropis trigonoclada var. bonatiana, commonly known as the 'Bonat's Campylotropis', is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Campylotropis trigonoclada var. bonatiana are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which may help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to be consumed for its medicinal effects.
